# Fonts
This folder is self explanatory.

Below are fonts currently in this folder, and if appropriate, information on how they've been obtained.

## Font Awesome_ico
This is a font of icons obtained using [Icomoon](https://icomoon.io/app/#/select). It includes all of FontAwesome's free icons and some free icons from icomoon. (about 716 icons)

You can find what icons have been selected exactly by going to [https://icomoon.io/app/#/select](https://icomoon.io/app/#/select) and clicking the `Import Icons` and selecting the `icomoon-selection.json` file in this folder.

Don't forget to change the paths in style.css after update and restart your local dev to get those changes into our stylesheets

Using icomoon helps us significantly reducing the size of fontawesome.
